title: Left 4 Dead Common Infected Sound Pack
body:
### Left 4 Dead Common Infected Sound Pack. The sounds where zombies have realistic screams.
Perfectly fits to hardcore gamemodes, like where zombies became running ones. - Ambient variants: 18 - Rage (hurt) variants: 27 - Death variants: 20 All sounds are property of Valve Software. This resource pack simply ports them for use in Minecraft. Sound effects were sourced from the left2mine mod.
